title: puccinellia californica
intro: Puccinellia californica, also known as California alkalai grass or alkali bent grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the western United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Puccinellia californica include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating skin irritations. It can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and is also used in herbal remedies such as salves and tinctures.
